title: CBSE CLASS 12TH RESULTS OUT | CM VIJAY WON TRUST VOTE | GOLD & SILVER TARIFF HIKE - MAY 13, 2026
description:
India’s biggest news updates of 13 May 2026 in one quick video.

In today’s top headlines, CBSE has declared the Class 12 Result 2026 with an overall pass percentage of 85.20%, while Trivandrum topped the regional list and Prayagraj recorded the lowest pass percentage.

Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Thalapathy Vijay won the Assembly trust vote with 144 MLAs supporting his government, while 24 AIADMK MLAs voted in his favour.

India has increased gold and silver import duty to 15%, including 10% basic customs duty and 5% AIDC, to reduce import pressure and support the rupee.

RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra has warned that petrol and diesel prices in India may rise if the Middle East conflict continues for longer.

We also cover Prateek Yadav’s sudden death, the US visa restrictions on people linked to KS International Traders over the fentanyl case, BJP convoy controversy in Madhya Pradesh, and N. Rangasamy taking oath as Puducherry Chief Minister for a record fifth term.

Watch the full video for all major India current affairs, political updates, economy news, education news, and international developments in just 3 minutes.
